programs.title: Auto Mundial
programs.desc: The latest news and reviews from the world of cars.

programs.title: Magnum, P.I.
programs.desc: Classic US action drama series. Thomas comes out of his coma, but his troubles are far from over as Colonel Ki's vengeful brother is still at large.

programs.title: Kojak
programs.desc: I Could Kill My Wife's Lawyer: Classic US detective drama. Theo sets out to prove that a detective's wife's sleazy divorce lawyer is responsible for an arson attack on a boat.

programs.title: The Saint
programs.desc: Drama series about suave troubleshooter Simon Templar. The Saint tries to stop a crime ring forming a deadly alliance with psychology students who plan murders.

programs.title: Boon
programs.desc: Answers to the Name of Watson: Classic drama. Ken is surprised when a couple staying at the Grand Hotel ask him to recover their stolen cat - and horrified by the cat being a lion.
